Low-Intensity Ultrasonic Brain Stimulation for Investigational Treatment of Refractory Fibromyalgia

We are seeking individuals interested in participating in a clinical study to evaluate the non-invasive, low intensity ultrasonic stimulation for investigational treatment of fibromyalgia.

If you:

  • have been diagnosed with fibromyalgia
  • are at least 22 years old
  • have tried at least two medications but continue to have symptoms
  • have tried non-drug treatment (i.e., physical therapy) but continue to have symptoms

You may be eligible for this study. In this study, you will undergo a comprehensive evaluation and MRI, and four 40-minute investigational treatment sessions. All study-related care is provided at no cost to you.

If you are interested contact us:

The Feinstein Institutes for Medical Research

350 Community Dr
Manhasset, NY 11030

Neurosurgery Research

516-472-5827
neurosurgeryresearch@northwell.edu

- NIH Brain Initiative
